hero.subtitle: Hello, World! I am
hero.title: Christian Miguel S. Licudan
about.text: Dynamic Full-Stack Developer & Multimedia Specialist with a BSIT degree. Seamlessly bridges the gap between robust back-end logic, intuitive front-end design, and engaging digital media. Adept at building scalable web applications while ensuring a polished visual identity and seamless user experience.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Led the development of a highly scalable web application using modern JavaScript frameworks. Improved performance by 40% and mentored junior developers.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs, built responsive UI components, and managed database migrations.

projects.title: CSE REVIEWER
projects.description: A comprehensive digital learning platform for Civil Service Exam preparation, replacing static reviewers with interactive practice exams, dynamic flashcards and real-time progress tracking.
tech: React · TypeScript · Node.js · Express · SQLite · REST API · RBAC
